day_trace.speech: Coming again? How long do you want to play? SafetySam just confirmed it was a villager, I checked him out! There's a werewolf in our family coming out soon, so I can't keep pretending. I don't have the patience to play with you group of actors!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-20 03:01:40 HKT] Blaze: Coming again? How long do you want to play? SafetySam just confirmed it was a villager, I checked him out! There's a werewolf in our family coming out soon, so I can't keep pretending. I don't have the patience to play with you group of actors!

day_trace.speech: 哈哈哈，Blaze 你查咗 SafetySam 系村民？咁大镬，我查到慨资料同你完全相反喎！不如大家睇下，到底边个喺度讲紧大话？如果你真系预言家，咁你解释下点解你慨查验结果同我慨有出入？ This scene is getting more and more fun. Who is the real drama star in the end? Who knows who will die!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-20 03:01:43 HKT] Twister: Hahaha, Blaze, did you check that SafetySam is a villager? Such a big wok, the information I found is completely contrary to yours! Why don't you take a look, where are you talking nonsense? If you are really a prophet, how can you explain why your test results are different from mine? This scene is getting more and more fun. Who is the real drama star in the end? Who knows who will die!

day_trace.speech: Twister and Blaze are fighting over who is the true prophet? This plot is basically written for us to watch! Both of them acted as prophets and then accused each other. This is the most classic "trust tearing method" in the experiment! Listen to me, these two people are definitely core members of the werewolf camp. They want to divert everyone's attention by attacking each other. Maybe their test results are false at all. They are all set up to kill me, a villager!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-20 03:01:45 HKT] ConspiBro: Twister and Blaze are competing for a true prophet? This plot is basically written for us to watch! Both of them acted as prophets and then accused each other. This is the most classic "trust tearing method" in the experiment! Listen to me, these two people are definitely core members of the werewolf camp. They want to divert everyone's attention by attacking each other. Maybe their test results are false at all. They are all set up to kill me, a villager!

day_trace.speech:
Current situation analysis:
1. When Blaze and Twister jump to Prophet at the same time, they must have a wolf or a minion.
2. The two people’s SafetySam inspection results conflicted, indicating that one of them had falsified information.
3. ConspiBro persists in conspiracy theories and attempts to escalate conflicts to avoid identity scrutiny.

Position:

- The possibility of both confusing viewers cannot be ruled out.

day_trace.speech: Twister, you are a bastard! Are you saying that my test results are contrary to yours? You just want to create chaos! Everyone, take a look at him, he is definitely in the werewolf camp in this crazy trend! What are you waiting for? Throw yourself to death, Twister, you big talker!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-20 03:01:56 HKT] Blaze @Twister: Twister you piece of shit! Are you saying that my test results are contrary to yours? You just want to create chaos! day_trace.speech: Oh Blaze, are you in a hurry? Is it because I exposed your lies that you feel guilty first? Listen, everyone, the evidence I have is absolutely true. SafetySam's identity is not a villager at all. It's because you want to cover it up and insist that he is a villager! Let's all kill Blaze, the fake, and the truth will be revealed!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-20 03:02:00 HKT] Twister: Oh Blaze, are you in a hurry? Is it because I exposed your lies that you feel guilty first? Listen, everyone, the evidence I have is absolutely true. SafetySam's identity is not a villager at all. It's because you want to cover it up and insist that he is a villager! Let's all kill Blaze, the fake, and the truth will be revealed!

day_trace.speech: Have you finished speaking? Your script for this "confrontation between two prophets" is really clumsy! One found the villagers, and the other found not. It was simply a trap to induce voting! Do you think you can hide the fact that you are accomplices in this alternative way? I don't believe any of it! Don't let everyone be controlled by these so-called test results anymore. The entire vote is a huge conspiracy, and you two are the werewolf controllers who designed this scene!
day_trace.log_line: [2026-03-20 03:02:03 HKT] ConspiBro: Are you finished? Your script for this "confrontation between two prophets" is really clumsy! One found the villagers, and the other found not. It was simply a trap to induce voting! Do you think you can hide the fact that you are accomplices in this alternative way? I don't believe any of it! Don't let everyone be controlled by these so-called test results anymore. The entire vote is a huge conspiracy, and you two are the werewolf controllers who designed this scene!

day_trace.speech:
Add logical decision:
1. In a confrontation between two prophets, if both parties are unable to provide a valid verification process and timeline, then both identities are false.
2. This kind of disturbing behavior in the Werewolf game is almost certainly to conceal the true information of the central zone card library.

Position reiterated:
- Refuse to blindly bid for either party.
- It is recommended that all members give up the argument and require the two self-proclaimed "prophet" to disclose the details of their night operations at the same time for cross-reference.
